quiz_results.summary: You're emotional and often pretty intense.

result_candidates.name: Candy Cat
result_candidates.summary: Candy is friendly and kind. Like the others, she loves to try new things and enjoys all sorts of activities - like playing a sport, having a tea party, or just going out to the beach or town. She is also highly curious. She does not seem to like it when others fight or argue. This happens in some episodes like " International Day " when the playgroup learns about the countries of the world, and most of the time, she does not seem to be able to take sides. The reason might be she does not want to create more conflict. Candy also seems to be proud of the fact she is a feline, meaning she has a cat family with bigger species.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 坎迪猫通常给人友好又柔和的感觉，不爱把场面弄得太紧张，更像轻轻加入大家的人。

result_candidates.name: Daddy Pig
result_candidates.summary: Daddy Pig is a sweet, caring, hyperactive, fun-loving, and clumsy dad. He always supports what Peppa and George want, and goes out of his way to make sure they feel special. He does not tell his children when he disagrees with something they say or do, as he believes that they are too young to understand. In Father's Day , Peppa and George make a ketchup-flavored cake for him, which he pretends to like, and in When I Grow Up , he supports Peppa's dream of being a puddle jumping champion when she grows up. He consoles Peppa in Jumping Stick when she becomes frustrated over not being able to properly use his jumping stick. He is almost never strict with Peppa, but this can be seen in a few episodes. In Bicycles , he has a talk with Peppa when she accidentally crashes into his giant pumpkin, and in The Market , he initially says no to her when she asks him to buy her a singing fish toy. Daddy Pig almost never gets agitated or upset, even in the worst possible situations, such as when a wasp was chasing him in Picnic , when he had to run alone in Fun Run , and when Grampy Rabbit forgot to pick him up for a picnic in The Little Boat . He does, however, get agitated when he cannot properly locate something on a map or when he loses his glasses. He is often clumsy and does not think about the consequences of his actions, as seen in Horsey Twinkle Toes , when he rides Peppa and George's toy horse down the hill and gets hurt after it crashes. His antagonistic side is shown in Chloe's Puppet Show , when he gossips in front of Peppa and George about Uncle Pig and how is snoring is annoying and obnoxious. Daddy Pig does not take warnings seriously and often believes that whichever way he is doing something is correct. He likes to call himself an expert at everything, even when he knows he is not. In Delphine Donkey , he thought the language French was "nonsense" when he heard it over the phone.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 猪爸爸有点迷糊，也有点爱逞强，但整体是轻松、幽默、很会让大家放松的人。

result_candidates.name: Daddy Rabbit
result_candidates.summary: Daddy Rabbit is a wise, intelligent, and generous rabbit. He is good at describing and teaching more complicated subjects. In Mummy Rabbit's Bump , Mr. Rabbit provides support for Mummy Rabbit by opening the car door for her. Later on, after eating a funny mixture of food, she announces that the baby is coming, so Daddy Rabbit rushes the family to the hospital. He struggles to park the car in time and is devastated by the fact that he missed seeing the baby twins being born, but is overjoyed that they are finally here. Daddy Rabbit is also curious, as seen in Grandpa Pig's Pond , when he asked Grandpa Pig where he dug up such artifacts that he put in the museum. He is interested in antiques and vintage items, and often looks for things to add to the museum collection. In Rebecca Rabbit , George refuses to eat carrots, so Daddy Rabbit eases him into it by telling him that he thought he was a rabbit, and in Paper Aeroplanes , he compliments Daddy Pig on his unintentional way of sending important documents by making them into paper aeroplanes.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 兔爸爸像那种脑子灵活、能解释很多事情、也愿意帮忙的人。

result_candidates.name: Danny Dog
result_candidates.summary: Danny Dog is kind, inclusive, and a little bit rambunctious.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 丹尼狗有点勇敢、也有点直接，整体像那种在热闹场景里很容易玩开的朋友。

result_candidates.name: Edmond Elephant
result_candidates.summary: Edmond Elephant is surprisingly clever and intelligent, especially for a younger kid. He is proud of his nickname "clever clogs" and often smiles big when people call him it. Although he likes this name, he sometimes wishes to be called "child prodigy," as seen in Children's Festival . Besides being witty, Edmond is also caring, helpful, and unafraid to take risks. In The Flying Vet , he expresses concern over seeing a sick gecko. In Going Boating , he helps his family row their boat in a boating race. His carefree nature is seen in Science Museum , when he leisurely agrees to take a dangerous ride, not caring about the dangers of it or getting hurt. Edmond is generally a happy and fascinated person, though sometimes he can be sensitive. Examples of this are seen in Edmond Elephant's Birthday , when he cries over not winning a party game, and in Spring , when he cries with his friends over not finding any chocolate eggs during an egg hunt. He also cries in International Day , when Suzy Sheep and Zoë Zebra attempt to take the sandpit from him and his friends.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 埃德蒙小象给人的感觉更偏知识型和认真型，像小朋友里的小小思考派。

result_candidates.name: Emily Elephant
result_candidates.species: Elephant (either Loxadonta africana or Elephas maximus)
result_candidates.summary: Emily is shown to be kind and gentle. She doesn't speak much due to being shy. In her debut episode Emily Elephant , Emily is shy when she arrives at playgroup and doesn't say anything to anyone, though she plays games with the children and fascinates them with her ability to use her trunk (revealing to be the loudest in the loudest game). She enjoys jumping in muddy puddles and most other things that the other children like doing. In Sleepover , she participates in a storytelling game with the girls and overcomes her shyness by making a loud trumpet sound with her trunk. She is not a fan of dancing on her own, as revealed in Shake, Rattle and Bang , when Madame Gazelle shows her how to play the castanets while dancing, when Emily asks if the dancing can be skipped. She enjoys hiking and exploring with her family, as seen in Around the World with Peppa and The Flying Vet . Emily enjoys trying new things, as seen in Peppa's Circus , when she attempts to juggle. Despite being shy, Emily has musical talent, as revealed in Talent Day , when she can play the recorder really well. Sometimes, Emily boasts about Edmond's cleverness, such as in Science Museum , though most of the time she does not say anything when he speaks intelligently.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 艾米莉小象聪明、懂事，也有一定的表达欲，看起来像又会想事又会参与的人。

result_candidates.name: George Pig
result_candidates.summary: As noted above, George is a kind, gentle pig who is always keen to look up to his older sister to grow up big and strong like she does. While Peppa can be a bit mean and bossy towards him (such as leaving him out of games), she still loves him all the same, and is always happy to help him whenever something goes wrong. George's portrayal is that of a real-life toddler his age. He is interested in topics such as dinosaurs , diggers , outer space , and history . With this, he has limited spoken dialogue, with most of his responses being simple Oinks aside if he's speaking in unison with other people. George can be a bit spoiled and bratty at times, and is most likely to cry easily when something goes wrong for him. The reason for this is that, being only two years old, George doesn't know any better. With this, he also doesn't like losing, and it takes someone like Peppa to tell him otherwise. He can also be quite picky when it comes to lunch and dinner, hesitating to eat healthily until he is provoked otherwise. In the episode George's Friend , it was shown that he doesn't like to share his toys with another person like Richard . However, he is also shown to be empathetic as he cries over seeing Richard Rabbit upset. Edmond Elephant's Birthday shows George to be selfish when he fights with Zuzu over the parcel in a game and takes his medal away from her. He cries over Mr. Dinosaur in many episodes too. If he loses him, if he has to share him, when he accidentally left him behind, when Peppa stated to give him away and a time when his tail broke off. As seen in the episode The Baby Piggy , George enjoys being given lots of attention as seen when the older children used him as a pretend baby, which he enjoyed until everyone left him for Baby Alexander and Candy Cat proviking that Alexander is sweeter than him. Sometimes, George may showcase hidden talents that he doesn't realize he has, such as in the episode Ice Skating , when he suddenly begins to skate like a pro, despite not being experienced or feeling confident at doing it at first. Despite his young age, he is shown to be quite intelligent in certain areas. In the episode Musical Instruments he’s is the only one in the family who can play the horn. In Polly's Holiday he is the one who ended up successfully getting Polly out of the tree by using bird seed. As the series progresses, he seems to be maturing as he cries less frequently and reacts more calmly in bad situations. As seen in Toilet Factory , George wants to change his nappy after Evie.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 乔治外表安静，但情绪很真，喜欢自己在意的东西，比如恐龙，也会在熟悉的人面前显得特别可爱。

result_candidates.name: Gerald Giraffe
result_candidates.summary: Gerald Giraffe is friendly, caring, and helpful. He is friends with the children at playgroup and can get along with them pretty well. Being tall, he is also good at helping others take down things from high surfaces. He also once rescued Tiddles the Tortoise from a treetop for Doctor Hamster . Sometimes, though, Gerald can be embarrassed or feel different being the tallest because this means he cannot do a lot of things the same way that his friends can. In Art House Day, he offers Peppa and Suzy cheeseballs as a snack. Gerald can be a bit shy sometimes and dislikes hide-and-seek because of his height.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 杰拉德长颈鹿偏温和、友好、慢一点热起来，但一旦熟了就会很自然。

result_candidates.name: Grampy Rabbit
result_candidates.summary: Grampy Rabbit is a kind, well-meaning rabbit. He is generous and helps people with their problems. In Doctor Hamster's Big Present , he makes Doctor Hamster a hamster wheel upon learning that she does not have the time or space to get fit and healthy. In Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse , he keeps a big light on at night for sailors to find their way in the dark, and shouts in a foghorn on foggy days. However, Grampy Rabbit can also be absent-minded and sometimes refuses to follow the rules. An example of this can be seen in Jukebox and Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft , when he entered sailing clubhouse property without having a membership, claiming that his excuse for it was that he was with Grandpa Pig , who had a membership at the sailing club. In Space Adventure! , when he took Peppa , George , Granny Pig , Granny Dog , and Madame Gazelle to the moon, not realizing that it was just supposed to be a pretend game. In The Lifeboat , he forgets to take his cell phone with him on a sailing trip and eventually becomes stranded on the sea during a storm.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 兔爷爷有经验、有主意，也有点不按常理出牌，像热闹里的老顽童。

result_candidates.name: Grandpa Pig
result_candidates.summary: Grandpa Pig is rather seen often as a showcaser or tutorialist, and he has a huge hatred towards animals eating his seeds and/or vegetables. He also doesn't like other stuff like gnomes, broken computers, etcetera, and he can be often disappointed at his failed attempts. Other than that, he's positive towards his gra ndk ids .
result_candidates.summary_zh: 猪爷爷更像有自己坚持和做事方式的人，偶尔固执，但对家人很上心。

result_candidates.name: Granny Pig
result_candidates.summary: Granny Pig is a kindhearted and caring grandmother. She always tries to accommodate Peppa and George and enjoys spending time with them. She likes wearing perfume, cooking, shopping, and relaxing. In Perfume , she teaches Peppa how to make her own perfume, and in Treasure Hunt , she creates a treasure hunt for Peppa and George. She likes strawberries, as seen in Strawberries . She is often casual and does not spend as much time thinking about the future as Grandpa Pig does. Granny Pig has a lot of friends and often likes to throw parties. She also likes dancing and drinking tea. Granny Pig's favorite type of music is rock and roll, as revealed in Jukebox .
result_candidates.summary_zh: 猪奶奶温柔、会照顾人，也很懂得在平常生活里制造温暖和乐趣。

result_candidates.name: Madame Gazelle
result_candidates.summary: Madame Gazelle is kindhearted, inclusive, brave, and outgoing. She cares about her children and always tries to accommodate them, and she often tells them stories about teaching their mummies and daddies when they were little. In Mr. Bull is Getting Married! , Madame Gazelle notifies the town to help out Mr. Bull when she discovers that he is getting married. In Numbers , she includes Daddy Pig in their activity when he shows up to playgroup too early, and in School Camp , she sings to the children when they cannot sleep at night. She is also lazy, as seen in Kiddie Workout! , when she initially refuses to exercise. Despite being a nice teacher, Madame Gazelle can sometimes be stern. An example of this can be seen in Move to Music , when she refuses to make the radio "go wrong again." She can also become snappy and impatient when she cannot do something. This is seen in The Panda Twins , when she is unable to find her phone in the classroom.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 羚羊夫人是非常典型的组织者角色，会照顾秩序，也有足够的威信去把大家带起来。

result_candidates.name: Mandy Mouse
result_candidates.summary: Most episodes show her as a cheerful, playful, friendly, energetic, kind-spirited and friendly girl. She’s also quite smart due as she explains certain things her friends such as getting married in the episode " Mr. Bull Is Getting Married! ".
result_candidates.summary_zh: 曼迪鼠乐观、友好、很有韧劲，像那种会在自己的方式里闪闪发光的人。

result_candidates.name: Mummy Pig
result_candidates.summary: Mummy Pig is a kind and responsible adult, who is more proactive and wittier than Daddy Pig. Being a more mature adult, she often tries to warn Daddy Pig when he may be doing something he shouldn't be. She is street-smart, as seen in Fun Fair , when she breaks a strength record in anger of Mr. Bull for calling Daddy Pig "round in the tummy." She enjoys drinking tea, dancing, and relaxing with her friends. Despite being a good person, she can also be a bit instinctive and thoughtless, such as when she simply just laughed at Peppa and Suzy when they had a fight instead of asking them what happened. She can also be a bit uncontrollable, as seen in Trampolines , when she bounced into a tree due to not being aware of her surroundings. She is afraid of spiders, as revealed in Mister Skinnylegs . When on her Mummy Mischief form, she has a mischevious attitude, mainly towards her children. As seen in Toilet Factory , George is wanting to use nappies so Miss Rabbit gives the Pig family a tour around a toilet museum
result_candidates.summary_zh: 猪妈妈给人的感觉是温柔又稳当，像那种能把家里节奏安排好、又很会照顾大家的人。

result_candidates.name: Mummy Rabbit
result_candidates.summary: Mummy Rabbit is a calm, caring, and kind rabbit. She cares a lot for her family and was willing to go through the trouble in helping her sister do her difficult jobs when she was injured in Miss Rabbit's Day Off . However, despite her being nice, Mummy Rabbit is also absent-minded and sometimes unaware of how to handle situations. This can be seen in Mummy Rabbit's Bump , when she ate a funny mixture of food at Peppa's house minutes before realizing she would be going into labor. Another example that shows this is in Miss Rabbit's Day Off, when she wasn't strict enough about asking Rebecca and Richard to put away all their toys. As a result, Miss Rabbit injures herself after tripping over Richard's toy car. Being the mother of four children, Mummy Rabbit is very motherly and often knows how to take care of children.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 兔妈妈是温和型照顾者，给人的感觉是可靠、平稳、很适合让人安心。

result_candidates.name: Pedro Pony
result_candidates.summary: Pedro Pony is a friendly pony. He is best friends with Danny Dog . He is somewhat smart in his fields of interest, but otherwise appears to be a bit naive and scatterbrained, as shown in some episodes when he gets the wrong fancy dress costume to an occasion, for example, in Danny's Pirate Party when he arrived to a pirate themed party dressed as a cowboy and in Gym Class , he wore a superhero costume instead of his gym kit. Lots of times, Pedro gets late to school due to how he likes sleeping. He also likes playing cowboys on some occasions. He is usually lazy and sleeps at daytime in some episodes. He can be shy as seen in the episode, School Play . He also likes superheroes.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 佩德罗小马是松弛感比较强的角色，看起来有点慢半拍，但也常常很可爱、很有自己的节奏。

result_candidates.name: Peppa Pig
result_candidates.summary: A loud and energetic pig who is easily excited, curious, and playful. At times Peppa can be forgetful and bossy, and she can be rude and stubborn if she doesn't know any better, but she will apologize if she realizes she did something wrong. She has a temper at times, which usually only comes out if she fails at something or gets really annoyed with George . While Peppa usually doesn't mean any harm, she is quite cheeky. She also embarrasses easily and may pout if she doesn't get her way, but she isn't really spoiled or mean-spirited. She is also naturally proud of her accomplishments and tends to show off if she knows she can. She dearly loves her family, but she has no problem being blunt with her parents, or teasing George . She is always making fun of Daddy Pig because he has a big tummy. She encourages him to exercise and once challenged him to do 100 press-ups. She idolizes her older cousin and tries to act mature when she is with her but the moment she sees a muddy puddle, she is unable to resist doing what comes naturally: jumping in it. Peppa enjoys playgroup because it is really exciting. She has lots of friends there because she is very confident, and everyone likes her. She is best friends with Suzy Sheep , who also love talking just like her. At playgroup, the kids often go camping, to the museum and on picnics which Peppa loves. Sometimes important people come to visit her playgroup like Mr. Potato and Super Potato from Potato City. Peppa loves Potato City. She is also honest and blurts out secrets and recent events like in " Jumble Sale ", and refers other people who tell her to say their secret identies by their normal identities. Most of all, Peppa loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles, laughing and making loud snorting noises.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 佩奇是那种会主动把气氛带热的小朋友，喜欢玩、喜欢表达，也很容易成为场子里最有存在感的那个。

result_candidates.name: Rebecca Rabbit
result_candidates.summary: Rebecca is a bubbly and energetic rabbit. She likes spending time with Peppa and her friends and enjoys swimming, dancing, and playing dress-up. In Not Very Well , she, Suzy , and Danny come to visit Peppa when she is ill, and in Foggy Day , she rides the swing with Peppa at the playground. Despite being outgoing, Rebecca is also shy in some instances. In Fancy Dress Party , when Peppa awards her costume as the best, her face turns red. In School Play , when she blushes when she says her line while practicing, and many times, turns red in the face, whenever carrots are mentioned. Rebecca can also be a bit mean sometimes, as seen in Ice Skating , when she and the rest of her friends laugh at Peppa when she slips on the ice, and in George's Friend , she gets mad at Peppa for George knocking over Richard 's sandcastle. She is good at trilling her lips, and uses it as her talent in Talent Day . She is good at sports, as seen in Gym Class and Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class , and she won a trophy for winning a running race in Sports Day . This can infer that Rebecca is good at sports, and she may participate in sports programs or attend classes.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 丽贝卡兔活泼、友好、愿意和大家一起玩，同时又带一点害羞和敏感。

result_candidates.name: Suzy Sheep
result_candidates.summary: Suzy Sheep is kind, caring, supportive, and inclusive, which makes her a good friend. In Flying on Holiday , she rings the doorbell multiple times hoping to see Peppa home from her vacation. In Pumpkin Competition , when the playgroup must start an evening pumpkin contest without Peppa, Suzy expresses sadness. However, in School Camp , Suzy asks to camp with the other girls from playgroup instead of Peppa, and near the end of the episode, she becomes scared after hearing an owl near her tent and rushes to Madame Gazelle 's tent without telling Peppa. She has a bossy side, which can be seen in multiple episodes. In Chatterbox , she bullies Peppa over not being able to be silent, and argues with the playgroup in International Day . She is easily annoyed and likes to take control of situations. In When I Grow Up , Suzy shares that she would like to be a nurse to help sick people get better, and also to tell people what to do. She communicates by using M's instead of B's while bleating.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 苏西羊是很典型的朋友型角色，既会陪伴别人，也常常有自己的小主意和主导欲。

result_candidates.name: The Queen
result_candidates.summary: The Queen is polite, kind, and caring. In The Queen , she was calm but a little bit excited to see Peppa and her friends. She didn't mind being asked questions by them and enjoyed being complimented about her palace. She likes to knit and take nature walks in her free time. At first, the Queen found mud and getting dirty unpleasant but changed her mind after Peppa introduced her to jumping in muddy puddles. The Queen respects people who work hard, as seen in the Queen, when she awarded Miss Rabbit a medal for her numerous, 24-hour community jobs in Peppatown . She is shown to be fond of Miss Rabbit and befriends her in The Queen. The Queen is proud of her city, London, and kindly offers to take Miss Rabbit and the children on a tour of London herself. She is brave and willing to take risks, as seen in London , when she managed to launch a heavy bus over a split-up bridge. The Queen enjoys having a good time and is often willing to help those she cares for.
result_candidates.summary_zh: 女王型结果通常意味着你看起来不吵，但很稳，有自己的分寸和被人尊重的气场。

characters.name: Alexander Pig
characters.summary: As he is only a baby, Baby Alexander doesn't have much of a personality. In the episode " The Noisy Night ", it is shown that he loves noise and it is generally the thing that puts him to sleep. Because of this, he is not like other babies who do not like noisy things. However, in the episode “Staying Up Late”, Auntie Pig shushes Peppa and Chloe and says, “Baby Alexander is asleep. We don’t want to wake him.” So, that noisy thing might’ve just been for that one episode. Baby Alexander likes to play with baby toys, rock in his rocker, play peek-a-boo and chew on things.

characters.name: Baby Bear
characters.summary: He only appeared in the episode Bedtime Story , when Peppa was telling a bedtime story to George . He came into his house after Georgie ate some porridge there. Then he told Georgie that it was actually magic porridge, and it would make you grow ginormous. He knew when that time came and pushed Georgie out of his house just in time. He then told Georgie that there was a golden treasure box on the other side of the earth, but he was too small to go all the way there, so Georgie helped him. When him and Georgie made it to the end of the earth, they met a dragon and the dragon greeted them by breathing fire. The dragon allowed them to take the treasure back home, but the curse of the magic porridge wore off, and Georgie began shrinking. Then the dragon offered to take Baby Bear and Georgie back to where Baby Bear lived.

characters.name: Belinda Bear
characters.summary: Belinda is slightly moody, a bit careless, but also caring and kind. In Chloé's Big Friends, she nicknames George "Geh" (pronounced Juh) and calls him and Peppa "little." She also thinks that children's music is "babyish," as revealed in Chloé's Big Friends and Roller Disco . She seems to act mature for her age, especially since she is only a few years older than Peppa. Her kindness is seen in a few episodes. In Once Upon a Time, she asks Peppa if she would like to have lunch with her family, and in Skateboarding , she gives Peppa a skateboarding lesson. Throughout the lesson, she also asks Peppa if she is feeling okay or if she needs assistance, which proves that she is caring. Belinda is good at following directions and likes to be part of any games that her friends play.

characters.summary: Candy is friendly and kind. Like the others, she loves to try new things and enjoys all sorts of activities - like playing a sport, having a tea party, or just going out to the beach or town. She is also highly curious. She does not seem to like it when others fight or argue. This happens in some episodes like " International Day " when the playgroup learns about the countries of the world, and most of the time, she does not seem to be able to take sides. The reason might be she does not want to create more conflict. Candy also seems to be proud of the fact she is a feline, meaning she has a cat family with bigger species.

characters.name: Daddy Pig
characters.summary: Daddy Pig is a sweet, caring, hyperactive, fun-loving, and clumsy dad. He always supports what Peppa and George want, and goes out of his way to make sure they feel special. He does not tell his children when he disagrees with something they say or do, as he believes that they are too young to understand. In Father's Day , Peppa and George make a ketchup-flavored cake for him, which he pretends to like, and in When I Grow Up , he supports Peppa's dream of being a puddle jumping champion when she grows up. He consoles Peppa in Jumping Stick when she becomes frustrated over not being able to properly use his jumping stick. He is almost never strict with Peppa, but this can be seen in a few episodes. In Bicycles , he has a talk with Peppa when she accidentally crashes into his giant pumpkin, and in The Market , he initially says no to her when she asks him to buy her a singing fish toy. Daddy Pig almost never gets agitated or upset, even in the worst possible situations, such as when a wasp was chasing him in Picnic , when he had to run alone in Fun Run , and when Grampy Rabbit forgot to pick him up for a picnic in The Little Boat . He does, however, get agitated when he cannot properly locate something on a map or when he loses his glasses. He is often clumsy and does not think about the consequences of his actions, as seen in Horsey Twinkle Toes , when he rides Peppa and George's toy horse down the hill and gets hurt after it crashes. His antagonistic side is shown in Chloe's Puppet Show , when he gossips in front of Peppa and George about Uncle Pig and how is snoring is annoying and obnoxious. Daddy Pig does not take warnings seriously and often believes that whichever way he is doing something is correct. He likes to call himself an expert at everything, even when he knows he is not. In Delphine Donkey , he thought the language French was "nonsense" when he heard it over the phone.

characters.name: Daddy Rabbit
characters.summary: Daddy Rabbit is a wise, intelligent, and generous rabbit. He is good at describing and teaching more complicated subjects. In Mummy Rabbit's Bump , Mr. Rabbit provides support for Mummy Rabbit by opening the car door for her. Later on, after eating a funny mixture of food, she announces that the baby is coming, so Daddy Rabbit rushes the family to the hospital. He struggles to park the car in time and is devastated by the fact that he missed seeing the baby twins being born, but is overjoyed that they are finally here. Daddy Rabbit is also curious, as seen in Grandpa Pig's Pond , when he asked Grandpa Pig where he dug up such artifacts that he put in the museum. He is interested in antiques and vintage items, and often looks for things to add to the museum collection. In Rebecca Rabbit , George refuses to eat carrots, so Daddy Rabbit eases him into it by telling him that he thought he was a rabbit, and in Paper Aeroplanes , he compliments Daddy Pig on his unintentional way of sending important documents by making them into paper aeroplanes.
characters.summary_zh: 兔爸爸像那种脑子灵活、能解释很多事情、也愿意帮忙的人。

characters.name: Doctor Brown Bear
characters.summary: Doctor Brown Bear is responsible, caring, and sweet towards little children. He always hurries to people's houses or wherever they are to treat them. Though in Grampy Rabbit in Space , he is somewhat resistant to showing up to playgroup to treat Grampy Rabbit . He always remembers to check on his patients and knows how to help them. However, sometimes, he might not know how serious an injury is, because in Christmas at the Hospital , he takes Peppa to the hospital for a minor injury. Often times, Doctor Brown Bear does not like to be around people. This is revealed in Pedro's Cough , when he becomes sick and refuses to take anyone's help and support and feels bothered and annoyed when people show up to his house to treat him. Despite being patient and sweet to children, Doctor Brown Bear is easily annoyed by them, as revealed in The Ambulance , when he becomes irritated when the children ask him constant questions and insist on bandaging him to "make him feel better." In Doctors , he communicates well with Doctor Hamster , Mr. Pony , Doctor Elephant , and Granddad Dog , though it is unknown if they are all friends.

characters.name: Dra Hamster
characters.summary: Mrs. Hamster is a gentle and kind caretaker who loves animals. She knows many things about them and is well-respected by others. She appears to be soft-spoken and speaks with a Northern England accent. When she's not treating animals, Doctor Hamster can often be found looking for Tiddles, who escapes carelessly and likes to climb trees unattended. She is very wise and knows how to handle situations involving animals. Her exhaustion in treating pets is revealed in A Day with Doctor Hamster , where she closes her office to those still in the waiting room due to her lack of energy to continue working. She enjoys talking to children like Peppa and her friends and sometimes visits the playgroup to talk about animals.

characters.name: Edmond Elephant
characters.summary: Edmond Elephant is surprisingly clever and intelligent, especially for a younger kid. He is proud of his nickname "clever clogs" and often smiles big when people call him it. Although he likes this name, he sometimes wishes to be called "child prodigy," as seen in Children's Festival . Besides being witty, Edmond is also caring, helpful, and unafraid to take risks. In The Flying Vet , he expresses concern over seeing a sick gecko. In Going Boating , he helps his family row their boat in a boating race. His carefree nature is seen in Science Museum , when he leisurely agrees to take a dangerous ride, not caring about the dangers of it or getting hurt. Edmond is generally a happy and fascinated person, though sometimes he can be sensitive. Examples of this are seen in Edmond Elephant's Birthday , when he cries over not winning a party game, and in Spring , when he cries with his friends over not finding any chocolate eggs during an egg hunt. He also cries in International Day , when Suzy Sheep and Zoë Zebra attempt to take the sandpit from him and his friends.

characters.name: Emily Elephant
characters.summary: Emily is shown to be kind and gentle. She doesn't speak much due to being shy. In her debut episode Emily Elephant , Emily is shy when she arrives at playgroup and doesn't say anything to anyone, though she plays games with the children and fascinates them with her ability to use her trunk (revealing to be the loudest in the loudest game). She enjoys jumping in muddy puddles and most other things that the other children like doing. In Sleepover , she participates in a storytelling game with the girls and overcomes her shyness by making a loud trumpet sound with her trunk. She is not a fan of dancing on her own, as revealed in Shake, Rattle and Bang , when Madame Gazelle shows her how to play the castanets while dancing, when Emily asks if the dancing can be skipped. She enjoys hiking and exploring with her family, as seen in Around the World with Peppa and The Flying Vet . Emily enjoys trying new things, as seen in Peppa's Circus , when she attempts to juggle. Despite being shy, Emily has musical talent, as revealed in Talent Day , when she can play the recorder really well. Sometimes, Emily boasts about Edmond's cleverness, such as in Science Museum , though most of the time she does not say anything when he speaks intelligently.

characters.summary: Gabriella is a kindhearted and friendly goat. This is seen in Holiday in the Sun , when she introduces herself to the pig family and teaches them, specifically Peppa, about Italian traditions, such as what they like to eat. She helps Peppa choose a postcard to write to Goldie when she hears that she misses her. Later on in the episode, after the pig family leave the local village, Gabriella tells her father that Peppa forgot Teddy . She kindly gives Teddy to a police officer , who returns it to her. In The End of the Holiday , Gabriella waves the pig family goodbye as they leave the vacation house. She also discovers once again that Peppa forgot Teddy, and she gives it back to the police officer, who returns it back to Peppa.

characters.name: George Pig
characters.summary: As noted above, George is a kind, gentle pig who is always keen to look up to his older sister to grow up big and strong like she does. While Peppa can be a bit mean and bossy towards him (such as leaving him out of games), she still loves him all the same, and is always happy to help him whenever something goes wrong. George's portrayal is that of a real-life toddler his age. He is interested in topics such as dinosaurs , diggers , outer space , and history . With this, he has limited spoken dialogue, with most of his responses being simple Oinks aside if he's speaking in unison with other people. George can be a bit spoiled and bratty at times, and is most likely to cry easily when something goes wrong for him. The reason for this is that, being only two years old, George doesn't know any better. With this, he also doesn't like losing, and it takes someone like Peppa to tell him otherwise. He can also be quite picky when it comes to lunch and dinner, hesitating to eat healthily until he is provoked otherwise. In the episode George's Friend , it was shown that he doesn't like to share his toys with another person like Richard . However, he is also shown to be empathetic as he cries over seeing Richard Rabbit upset. Edmond Elephant's Birthday shows George to be selfish when he fights with Zuzu over the parcel in a game and takes his medal away from her. He cries over Mr. Dinosaur in many episodes too. If he loses him, if he has to share him, when he accidentally left him behind, when Peppa stated to give him away and a time when his tail broke off. As seen in the episode The Baby Piggy , George enjoys being given lots of attention as seen when the older children used him as a pretend baby, which he enjoyed until everyone left him for Baby Alexander and Candy Cat proviking that Alexander is sweeter than him. Sometimes, George may showcase hidden talents that he doesn't realize he has, such as in the episode Ice Skating , when he suddenly begins to skate like a pro, despite not being experienced or feeling confident at doing it at first. Despite his young age, he is shown to be quite intelligent in certain areas. In the episode Musical Instruments he’s is the only one in the family who can play the horn. In Polly's Holiday he is the one who ended up successfully getting Polly out of the tree by using bird seed. As the series progresses, he seems to be maturing as he cries less frequently and reacts more calmly in bad situations. As seen in Toilet Factory , George wants to change his nappy after Evie.

Sometimes, though, Gerald can be embarrassed or feel different being the tallest because this means he cannot do a lot of things the same way that his friends can. In Art House Day, he offers Peppa and Suzy cheeseballs as a snack. Gerald can be a bit shy sometimes and dislikes hide-and-seek because of his height.

characters.name: Grampy Rabbit
characters.summary: Grampy Rabbit is a kind, well-meaning rabbit. He is generous and helps people with their problems. In Doctor Hamster's Big Present , he makes Doctor Hamster a hamster wheel upon learning that she does not have the time or space to get fit and healthy. In Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse , he keeps a big light on at night for sailors to find their way in the dark, and shouts in a foghorn on foggy days. However, Grampy Rabbit can also be absent-minded and sometimes refuses to follow the rules. An example of this can be seen in Jukebox and Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft , when he entered sailing clubhouse property without having a membership, claiming that his excuse for it was that he was with Grandpa Pig , who had a membership at the sailing club. In Space Adventure! , when he took Peppa , George , Granny Pig , Granny Dog , and Madame Gazelle to the moon, not realizing that it was just supposed to be a pretend game. In The Lifeboat , he forgets to take his cell phone with him on a sailing trip and eventually becomes stranded on the sea during a storm.

characters.name: Granny Pig
characters.summary: Granny Pig is a kindhearted and caring grandmother. She always tries to accommodate Peppa and George and enjoys spending time with them. She likes wearing perfume, cooking, shopping, and relaxing. In Perfume , she teaches Peppa how to make her own perfume, and in Treasure Hunt , she creates a treasure hunt for Peppa and George. She likes strawberries, as seen in Strawberries . She is often casual and does not spend as much time thinking about the future as Grandpa Pig does. Granny Pig has a lot of friends and often likes to throw parties. She also likes dancing and drinking tea. Granny Pig's favorite type of music is rock and roll, as revealed in Jukebox .
characters.age: 58 years old 59 years old (Season 4-Season 7) 60 (Season 8-Currently)
characters.summary_zh: 猪奶奶温柔、会照顾人，也很懂得在平常生活里制造温暖和乐趣。

characters.name: Granny Sheep
characters.summary: Granny Sheep is a wise and passionate old lady. She is creative and sweet to children, as revealed in Cardboard Boxes , when she helps Suzy and her friends make crafts and games with cardboard boxes. She has a strong interest in art, as revealed in Art House Day , where she attends an art house fair and even features her own artwork. She explains in detail how she created each piece and expresses emotion when describing them.

characters.name: Lotte Llama
characters.summary: Lotte is a kind and friendly llama. When she sees Peppa watching her, she goes and says hi to her. She talks to the children and answers all their questions, which proves her friendliness and kindness. Lotte is also quite proud of being able to speak German and is also a good teacher because all the children knew how to speak basic German by the end of the episode at playgroup. She also has a way of making things fun, like during recess, she showed the children a fun way of learning German numbers by playing hopscotch. Even though she enjoyed the attention, Lotte was a bit shy at first to see all the new children and at a new playgroup, but she was quick to open up to everyone.

characters.name: Madame Gazelle
characters.summary: Madame Gazelle is kindhearted, inclusive, brave, and outgoing. She cares about her children and always tries to accommodate them, and she often tells them stories about teaching their mummies and daddies when they were little. In Mr. Bull is Getting Married! , Madame Gazelle notifies the town to help out Mr. Bull when she discovers that he is getting married. In Numbers , she includes Daddy Pig in their activity when he shows up to playgroup too early, and in School Camp , she sings to the children when they cannot sleep at night. She is also lazy, as seen in Kiddie Workout! , when she initially refuses to exercise. Despite being a nice teacher, Madame Gazelle can sometimes be stern. An example of this can be seen in Move to Music , when she refuses to make the radio "go wrong again." She can also become snappy and impatient when she cannot do something. This is seen in The Panda Twins , when she is unable to find her phone in the classroom.

characters.name: Mr Wallaby
characters.summary: Mr. Wallaby is very polite, friendly, and understanding. In Boomerang, when Daddy Kangaroo demonstrates how to throw a boomerang, he accidentally smashes one of Mr. Wallaby's windows, to which Mr. Wallaby assures is okay. Daddy Pig then has a go with throwing the boomerang, but ends up smashing another one of his windows. Mr. Wallaby then demonstrates how to throw the boomerang, but ends up smashing his last window, leaving him speechless. Daddy Kangaroo reacts to this hastily, apologizing but assuring that they must go. Mr. Wallaby immediately forgives them, despite the damages he must pay for his broken windows. Mr. Wallaby is also social and enjoys gatherings, as seen in Christmas with Kylie Kangaroo, where he reunites with the pig and kangaroo families, even having a barbecue with them. They eat corn on the cob and spend time on the beach, even getting to see Father Christmas. Mr. Wallaby enjoys festivals, wearing different outfits, dancing, and jumping in muddy puddles. It could be possible that he is popular in his town and may have a lot of family members, although they are never seen or mentioned.
characters.summary_zh: Mr Wallaby是佩奇宇宙里的Wallaby角色。整体给人的感觉更像友好。

characters.name: Mr. Bull
characters.summary: Mr. Bull is polite, kind, easygoing, and considerate. In Digger World , when Peppa accidentally knocks down his bricks, he does not get angry at her and instead chuckles, understanding that she did not intend to do it. In Mr. Bull in a China Shop , he decides to repay Miss Rabbit by fixing a pothole in her road after she fixed his teapot. Despite being kind, Mr. Bull can also be a bit uncontrollable. This is seen with his obsession in digging up roads, even if they don't have to be dug up. Mr. Bull is also shown to be absent-minded, as seen in Mr. Bull is Getting Married! , where he casually tells Madame Gazelle that he is getting married, not believing it to be a big deal. Mr. Bull is also shown to be a bit inconsiderate and rude, as seen in Funfair , when he fat shames Daddy Pig , much to Mummy Pig 's anger.
characters.summary_zh: Mr. Bull是佩奇宇宙里的Bull角色。整体给人的感觉更像善良、容易分神。和 Mr. Bull's Brother、Mrs. Cow、Carol Cow 这些家人关系较近。

characters.summary: Mr. Stallion shares similar personality traits with Mrs. Corgi. He likes to give advice and show off his abilities, such as sailing professionally on his boat and scoring a hole-in-one in golf. He is also stubborn as revealed in Jukebox , where he criticized Granny Pig's choice of music, rock and roll, and switched it to disco. He is also irresponsible as revealed in Police Car , where his car engine stopped, revealing that he did not take it to fill up on gas soon enough before the engine stopped. He is often excited to see Grandpa Pig and has a loud voice.

characters.name: Mrs Cow
characters.summary: Mrs. Cow is responsible, calm, and hardworking. She knows a lot about children, being a children's nurse. She is accommodating, as seen in Hospital , when she stops her duties just to scratch Pedro 's ear. However, she can also be snappy and impatient sometimes, as seen in The Lifeboat , when she asks Grampy Rabbit why he took so long to come to her cheese shop. In Getting Ready for the Wedding! , she cries emotionally when trying on a dress for her wedding. Mrs. Cow likes tent dresses and the color golden yellow. She also likes the stench of smelly cheese. In Naughty Tortoise , she gets stuck in a tree trying to rescue Tiddles the Tortoise , much to her frustration. She may be a fan of Mr. Potato because she showed up to see him when he came to town for a special appearance, as seen in Mr. Potato Comes to Town .
characters.summary_zh: Mrs Cow是佩奇宇宙里的奶牛角色。整体给人的感觉更像靠谱、冷静、情绪明显。和 Mr. Bull、Carol Cow、Mr. Bull's Brother 这些家人关系较近。

characters.name: Mrs Crocodile
characters.summary: Mrs. Crocodile is responsible, caring, and helpful. In The Zoo , she introduced the penguins to the children and let them watch her feed them. In Canoe Trip, she offered to push the pig family's boat due to the strong current. In Clubhouse Adventure , she and Mr. Lion look for the penguins and encourage the children to help them. Though she often means well, Mrs. Crocodile can sometimes be quite frightening. In The Zoo, there is a running gag with her hinting at wanting to eat Madame Gazelle , and in Canoe Trip, she startles Mummy Pig by jumping out of the water and splashing water into her face.
characters.summary_zh: Mrs Crocodile是佩奇宇宙里的Crocodile角色。整体给人的感觉更像会照顾人、靠谱。

characters.name: Mrs. Leopard
characters.summary: Mrs. Leopard is kindhearted, supportive, and friendly. She expresses excitement over being able to help Mrs. Cow choose a wedding dress. She is passionate about wearing presentable clothes, being a dressmaker. Mrs. Leopard is sweet to children, which is seen when she lets Peppa help her cut fabric. However, she can also be a bit careless and strict. When Mrs. Cow returned her wedding dress, Mrs. Leopard accidentally cut into it, unaware of the damage that she did to the dress. Mrs. Leopard can be strict when it comes to bringing tea.
characters.summary_zh: Mrs. Leopard是佩奇宇宙里的角色角色。整体给人的感觉更像善良、会照顾人、友好。

characters.name: Mummy Dog
characters.summary: Mummy Dog is kindhearted, hardworking and supportive. She is also a bit frightened, as seen in School Play , when Granddad Dog scares her while pretending to be the Big Bad Wolf from Little Red Riding Hood. Her kindness is seen in Canal Boat , when she surprises Captain Dog with a canal boat trip for his birthday, and in Danny's Pirate Bedroom , she helps Danny and Captain Dog redecorate Danny's room. She is hardworking as a firefighter, as seen in The Fire Engine , where she turns on the hose during a fire, and in Fire Station Practice , where she runs an obstacle course with the other mummies. She is also good at solving problems, as seen in Danny's Pirate Party , when she stops Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog's argument by thanking them for planning Danny's birthday party.

characters.name: Mummy Pig
characters.summary: Mummy Pig is a kind and responsible adult, who is more proactive and wittier than Daddy Pig. Being a more mature adult, she often tries to warn Daddy Pig when he may be doing something he shouldn't be. She is street-smart, as seen in Fun Fair , when she breaks a strength record in anger of Mr. Bull for calling Daddy Pig "round in the tummy." She enjoys drinking tea, dancing, and relaxing with her friends. Despite being a good person, she can also be a bit instinctive and thoughtless, such as when she simply just laughed at Peppa and Suzy when they had a fight instead of asking them what happened. She can also be a bit uncontrollable, as seen in Trampolines , when she bounced into a tree due to not being aware of her surroundings. She is afraid of spiders, as revealed in Mister Skinnylegs . When on her Mummy Mischief form, she has a mischevious attitude, mainly towards her children. As seen in Toilet Factory , George is wanting to use nappies so Miss Rabbit gives the Pig family a tour around a toilet museum

characters.name: Mummy Polar Bear
characters.summary: Mummy Polar Bear is a kind and caring mother. She supports Penny and always tries to accommodate her, and she enjoys making her and Doctora Polar Bear their favorite food: spaghetti. In the Clubhouse Saga , she participates in the children's games to cheer Penny up. In Igloo , she praises the pig family's igloo, which shows her kindness towards other people as well. Mummy Polar Bear has a similar personality to Doctora Polar Bear.

characters.name: Mummy Pony
characters.summary: Mummy Pony is a caring, kind, and concerned mother. She cares about her son's well-being and always looks out for him. She knows when to be strict, as seen in Pirate Treasure , when she asks Pedro where he kept his glasses, and scolds him when he tells her a code word instead of properly answering her. In Pedro is Late , she runs into Pedro's room in the morning and rushes him to get up for a school trip. She manages to stop the school bus by chasing after it in her car. Mummy Pony's determination makes her a caring and responsible mother. She is also patient and almost never gets mad at Pedro for not remembering to wake up on time for his duties. In School Play , she helps Pedro practice his lines for a school play the class was rehearsing for.

characters.name: Mummy Rabbit
characters.summary: Mummy Rabbit is a calm, caring, and kind rabbit. She cares a lot for her family and was willing to go through the trouble in helping her sister do her difficult jobs when she was injured in Miss Rabbit's Day Off . However, despite her being nice, Mummy Rabbit is also absent-minded and sometimes unaware of how to handle situations. This can be seen in Mummy Rabbit's Bump , when she ate a funny mixture of food at Peppa's house minutes before realizing she would be going into labor. Another example that shows this is in Miss Rabbit's Day Off, when she wasn't strict enough about asking Rebecca and Richard to put away all their toys. As a result, Miss Rabbit injures herself after tripping over Richard's toy car. Being the mother of four children, Mummy Rabbit is very motherly and often knows how to take care of children.

characters.name: Mummy Sheep
characters.summary: Mummy Sheep is polite and willing to do whatever her daughter wants. Despite going to the gym, she gets easily tired, as seen in Families . She can get easily panicked, as seen in School Project , when she realizes she has to help Suzy with a craft project for playgroup , and be short-tempered, as seen in Granny Sheep Moves In , when her mother makes her carry a bunch of boxes at once. She dislikes balls and noisy areas, as seen in Garden Games and Racquet Games , when a ball falls into her tea in both episodes. Sometimes, Mummy Sheep likes to be childish, as seen in Trampolines , when she spontaneously starts jumping on the children's trampolines. She tries to avoid spending too much money and buying too many toys. On rare occasions, she can be rude and gossip, as seen in Suzy Goes Away , when she complains to Mummy Pig that where they live is boring. She also talks excitedly about moving in the episode and tells Mummy Pig like it is official, even though she does not even know if she has gotten the job to even move, and at the end of the episode, she realizes she did not get the job. This indicates her absent-mindedness.

characters.name: Mummy Zebra
characters.summary: Mummy Zebra is a caring, sweet, friendly, but strict mother. She always supports what her children want and dedicates her time to helping them make a pottery set in Pottery. In The Park , she is seen with Zoë Zebra looking at the ducks in the park. In Sleepover , she trusts Zoë to be alone with her friends and not cause trouble or be too loud during a girls sleepover, but becomes angry when they make a lot of noise and ignore her rules. Mummy Zebra is patient and provides a solution to Peppa when she gets frustrated over not being able to professionally do pottery. She is very supportive, even of other children, and compliments George 's clay dinosaur.

characters.name: PC Panda
characters.summary: Police Officer Panda is a hard-working panda. He is caring of his daughters, as seen in The Panda Twins , when he phoned Madame Gazelle to ask how Peggi and Pandora were doing. Though he acts sophisticated, sometimes he may be clueless or uncertain. An example of this is seen in Police Station , when he carelessly drops coins in an underground tunnel. He can also be irresponsible sometimes, as seen in Families , when he turns on the siren in his police car for Mummy Panda and his daughters, despite it not being an emergency. Police Officer Panda works well with Police Officer Squirrel female.

characters.name: Pedro Pony
characters.summary: Pedro Pony is a friendly pony. He is best friends with Danny Dog . He is somewhat smart in his fields of interest, but otherwise appears to be a bit naive and scatterbrained, as shown in some episodes when he gets the wrong fancy dress costume to an occasion, for example, in Danny's Pirate Party when he arrived to a pirate themed party dressed as a cowboy and in Gym Class , he wore a superhero costume instead of his gym kit. Lots of times, Pedro gets late to school due to how he likes sleeping. He also likes playing cowboys on some occasions. He is usually lazy and sleeps at daytime in some episodes. He can be shy as seen in the episode, School Play . He also likes superheroes.

characters.name: Peppa Pig
characters.summary: A loud and energetic pig who is easily excited, curious, and playful. At times Peppa can be forgetful and bossy, and she can be rude and stubborn if she doesn't know any better, but she will apologize if she realizes she did something wrong. She has a temper at times, which usually only comes out if she fails at something or gets really annoyed with George . While Peppa usually doesn't mean any harm, she is quite cheeky. She also embarrasses easily and may pout if she doesn't get her way, but she isn't really spoiled or mean-spirited. She is also naturally proud of her accomplishments and tends to show off if she knows she can. She dearly loves her family, but she has no problem being blunt with her parents, or teasing George . She is always making fun of Daddy Pig because he has a big tummy. She encourages him to exercise and once challenged him to do 100 press-ups. She idolizes her older cousin and tries to act mature when she is with her but the moment she sees a muddy puddle, she is unable to resist doing what comes naturally: jumping in it. Peppa enjoys playgroup because it is really exciting. She has lots of friends there because she is very confident, and everyone likes her. She is best friends with Suzy Sheep , who also love talking just like her. At playgroup, the kids often go camping, to the museum and on picnics which Peppa loves. Sometimes important people come to visit her playgroup like Mr. Potato and Super Potato from Potato City. Peppa loves Potato City. She is also honest and blurts out secrets and recent events like in " Jumble Sale ", and refers other people who tell her to say their secret identies by their normal identities. Most of all, Peppa loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles, laughing and making loud snorting noises.

characters.name: Rebecca Rabbit
characters.summary: Rebecca is a bubbly and energetic rabbit. She likes spending time with Peppa and her friends and enjoys swimming, dancing, and playing dress-up. In Not Very Well , she, Suzy , and Danny come to visit Peppa when she is ill, and in Foggy Day , she rides the swing with Peppa at the playground. Despite being outgoing, Rebecca is also shy in some instances. In Fancy Dress Party , when Peppa awards her costume as the best, her face turns red. In School Play , when she blushes when she says her line while practicing, and many times, turns red in the face, whenever carrots are mentioned. Rebecca can also be a bit mean sometimes, as seen in Ice Skating , when she and the rest of her friends laugh at Peppa when she slips on the ice, and in George's Friend , she gets mad at Peppa for George knocking over Richard 's sandcastle. She is good at trilling her lips, and uses it as her talent in Talent Day . She is good at sports, as seen in Gym Class and Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class , and she won a trophy for winning a running race in Sports Day . This can infer that Rebecca is good at sports, and she may participate in sports programs or attend classes.

characters.name: Richard Rabbit
characters.summary: Richard Rabbit acts like the other toddlers in the series. He is often seen with his best friend George and their other toddler friends, as well as the group. Richard has a stuffed toy dinosaur just like George, but it is red instead of green. In most episodes, he and George have almost identical personalities. The only differences being Richard crying less than George, showing more of a mischievous side and being more fond of carrots. In the episode " Rebecca Rabbit ", he was crying due to having a fear of staircases since his house doesn’t have them, but later episodes show that he climbs down them without any problems.

characters.name: Rosie and Robbie Rabbit
characters.summary: Rosie and Robbie Rabbit are minor characters on the show, and the only infant twins. They are fraternal twins, Rosie being the girl, and Robbie being the boy. Rosie wears pink, and Robbie wears blue. They are the children of Daddy Rabbit and Mummy Rabbit , the younger siblings of Rebecca and Richard Rabbit , the niece and nephew of Miss Rabbit , and the grandchildren of Grampy Rabbit . They were born in the episode Mummy Rabbit's Bump , and their latest major appearance is in The Petting Farm , where they are both shown looking older and wearing different color clothes, Rosie wearing blue, and Robbie wearing orange. They can make sounds and respond to talking by laughing and giggling, and they can understand small talk. Rosie and Robbie are always seen together in a stroller or being cradled in Mummy Rabbit's arms.
characters.summary_zh: Rosie and Robbie Rabbit是佩奇宇宙里的小兔角色。整体给人的感觉更像有创意。和 兔爸爸、兔妈妈、丽贝卡兔 这些家人关系较近。

characters.name: Suzy Sheep
characters.summary: Suzy Sheep is kind, caring, supportive, and inclusive, which makes her a good friend. In Flying on Holiday , she rings the doorbell multiple times hoping to see Peppa home from her vacation. In Pumpkin Competition , when the playgroup must start an evening pumpkin contest without Peppa, Suzy expresses sadness. However, in School Camp , Suzy asks to camp with the other girls from playgroup instead of Peppa, and near the end of the episode, she becomes scared after hearing an owl near her tent and rushes to Madame Gazelle 's tent without telling Peppa. She has a bossy side, which can be seen in multiple episodes. In Chatterbox , she bullies Peppa over not being able to be silent, and argues with the playgroup in International Day . She is easily annoyed and likes to take control of situations. In When I Grow Up , Suzy shares that she would like to be a nurse to help sick people get better, and also to tell people what to do. She communicates by using M's instead of B's while bleating.

characters.name: The Queen
characters.summary: The Queen is polite, kind, and caring. In The Queen , she was calm but a little bit excited to see Peppa and her friends. She didn't mind being asked questions by them and enjoyed being complimented about her palace. She likes to knit and take nature walks in her free time. At first, the Queen found mud and getting dirty unpleasant but changed her mind after Peppa introduced her to jumping in muddy puddles. The Queen respects people who work hard, as seen in the Queen, when she awarded Miss Rabbit a medal for her numerous, 24-hour community jobs in Peppatown . She is shown to be fond of Miss Rabbit and befriends her in The Queen. The Queen is proud of her city, London, and kindly offers to take Miss Rabbit and the children on a tour of London herself. She is brave and willing to take risks, as seen in London , when she managed to launch a heavy bus over a split-up bridge. The Queen enjoys having a good time and is often willing to help those she cares for.
characters.age: 78 (when the show takes place) 96 (age of death [real life]) (deceased)

characters.name: Uncle Pig
characters.summary: Uncle Pig loves to play and have fun with his family, but he's more mature than Daddy Pig , since he's wiser. He is mostly known for his optimistic and enthusiastic attitude, but his daughter , niece and nephew don't tease him because he's less overweight than his brother . Sometimes Uncle Pig shows a serious side, and he dislikes being compared to his younger brother. Like the rest of the family, he also loves jumping in muddy puddles . Despite this, he is pretty smart and strategist, such as understanding the complexity behind how mirrors work. He can be humble and a bit reserved sometimes, but other times he has no problems boasting. Unlike Mummy Pig's parents, Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig, Uncle Pig and Daddy Pig's parents have been never shown or heard of in the series. He gets sleepy when he after eating too much lunch, snoring loudly

characters.name: Zoë Zebra
characters.summary: Zoë Zebra is a friendly zebra who appears to be generally nice and a bit quiet. But, she sometimes doesn't pay attention to others and can misbehave in her own environment; as shown when she changed the television without asking Daddy Zebra's permission, or not allowing Zuzu and Zaza to join her slumber party until the other girls convinced her they can stay in the sitting room. However, she seems to get along well with her little sisters, and friends compared to Peppa's relationship with George.
